title: Make money during bear with Felix on $HYPE
summary_title: Make money during the bear with Felix: Liquidation rewards and stable yields
summary_description: How Felix Protocol's stability pool lets you earn 5-7% APR plus liquidation rewards by depositing stablecoins on Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: Space opens with discussion of upcoming launch and market activity
Aaron from Felix introduces the protocol and team background in DeFi risk
Felix's vision: secure money markets and CDP stablecoin model for Hyperliquid
How stability pools work: first rights to liquidations, 5% penalty rewards
APY breakdown: 5-6% stable yield plus additional liquidation rewards from fees
Felix launches points program tomorrow; mint cap raising to 5 million FEUSD
Future roadmap: Bitcoin support this week, LSTs pending pre-compiles availability
Vision for structured products and expanding Hyperliquid's user base beyond DeFi natives
